evals.prompt: Bootstrap a new Python project called my-awesome-app with public visibility
evals.expected_output: GitHub repo created, project cloned, language-specific setup completed, and registered in repo-registry.yaml
assertions: gh repo create command is executed with template and visibility flags
Python-specific setup (src/, tests/ directories) is created
Self-destruct of bootstrapper SKILL.md is completed

evals.prompt: Bootstrap a TypeScript Next.js project called web-dashboard
evals.expected_output: GitHub repo created, project cloned, Next.js CI configuration generated
assertions: gh repo create is called with correct project name
CI workflow includes Node.js setup and npm test
Project structure includes src/ and tests/ directories
